conditions: The accounts and OUs are governed by a Control Tower landing zone and the selected controls are enabled.
decision_context: Use when classifying governance mechanisms by effect.
exclusions: A detective control does not itself prevent the event it detects.

source_references.locator: Features > Controls; How AWS Control Tower interacts with other AWS services
source_references.supported_proposition: Control Tower distinguishes preventive, detective, and proactive governance mechanisms.

statement: AWS Control Tower preventive controls block actions, detective controls identify noncompliant resources, and proactive controls check supported resources before provisioning.
